current_or_source_truth: Capture stores prompt text up to 8000 characters and response text up to 16000 characters in observations.
kolm_policy: Importer should be stricter than current capture and require privacy mode before storing raw bodies.
risk: Trace import can expand the current raw-data retention gap.
recommended_action: Add privacy mode fields before external importer implementation.

current_or_source_truth: Capture reads upstream provider keys from explicit headers and does not persist them in observation rows.
kolm_policy: Keep this rule for importers and never write source API keys to manifests or loss reports.
risk: Credential leakage would be catastrophic and unnecessary.
recommended_action: Add tests that manifests redact auth headers and env-derived tokens.

current_or_source_truth: Capture has namespace drift between corpus_namespace and namespace plus no retention per namespace.
kolm_policy: Use one tenant.namespace field and attach retention policy at namespace/import manifest level.
risk: Imported rows could be impossible to purge by intended namespace.
recommended_action: Normalize namespace and add purge-by-namespace tests.

current_or_source_truth: Discarded rows are hidden from inbox but still exported/counted by labels and distill paths.
kolm_policy: Privacy policy should treat discarded as excluded from export, eval derivation, and distill by default.
risk: A user discard action does not protect data from downstream use.
recommended_action: Make kept-only export default and record triage state in rows.

current_or_source_truth: Account delete soft-deletes tenant auth but does not purge observations, jobs, artifacts, cache, or registry rows.
kolm_policy: Do not claim imported trace deletion until purge/anonymize command exists.
risk: Delete expectations from source systems will not be met locally.
recommended_action: Build import purge before public importer claims.

current_or_source_truth: Cache can live outside configured data lifecycle and may contain sensitive outputs.
kolm_policy: Import purge scope should include cache entries keyed by imported rows.
risk: Sensitive imported outputs can survive account deletion.
recommended_action: Move cache under configured data root and link cache keys to tenant/source rows.

current_or_source_truth: Artifacts should embed only input, expected, params, and generated case IDs.
kolm_policy: Keep raw source metadata, user/session IDs, comments, raw refs, and source delete refs in manifests only.
risk: Portable artifacts could spread regulated source data.
recommended_action: Add eval embedding allowlist and fixture tests.

current_or_source_truth: Hash-only stores source IDs, hashes, metrics, model, timestamps, and safe metadata but no raw IO.
kolm_policy: Make hash-only the safest non-raw mode and block eval derivation unless approved data exists.
risk: Users may expect artifacts from data Kolm did not store.
recommended_action: Make hash-only loss report explicit.

current_or_source_truth: Redacted mode stores redacted IO plus original checksums and a redaction report.
kolm_policy: Allow eval derivation only from redacted fields.
risk: Redaction can be incomplete or silently drop necessary eval context.
recommended_action: Emit redaction detector paths, counts, and dropped-field report.

current_or_source_truth: Raw mode stores source IO and metadata.
kolm_policy: Require explicit allow-raw, retention_days, namespace, and manifest warning.
risk: Raw import can create the largest compliance blast radius.
recommended_action: Make raw mode opt-in and fail without retention.

current_or_source_truth: Blocked mode refuses import when required privacy fields or unsupported payloads exist.
kolm_policy: Default to blocked for unknown source exports, missing retention, or unsupported media/attachments.
risk: Importer might store data it cannot govern.
recommended_action: Fail closed and report blocked reasons without sample values.

current_or_source_truth: Source systems can include user IDs, sessions, threads, or metadata that identify people.
kolm_policy: Use tenant-salted hashes for user_hash and session_hash; keep source IDs out of artifacts.
risk: Direct identifiers can leak into artifacts, logs, or dashboards.
recommended_action: Add salted identity hashing fixture.

current_or_source_truth: Schema supports raw_payload_ref and checksum but no implementation exists.
kolm_policy: Store raw payloads out of normalized rows when raw mode is used.
risk: Inline raw payloads make purge and artifact boundaries harder.
recommended_action: Add sidecar storage and checksum tests before raw import.

current_or_source_truth: No import manifest exists today.
kolm_policy: Manifest must record privacy mode, retention, row IDs, checksums, loss report, source export ref, and purge scope.
risk: Rows become impossible to audit or delete as a batch.
recommended_action: Make manifest mandatory output for every importer.

current_or_source_truth: External tools expose retention controls or deletion APIs; local import has none.
kolm_policy: Require retention_days for raw and redacted imports; allow explicit indefinite only for local private mode.
risk: Imported traces can outlive source retention expectations.
recommended_action: Add purge_after to every imported row.

current_or_source_truth: Langfuse stores event data indefinitely by default but supports project-level retention for traces, observations, scores, and media assets.
kolm_policy: Import should preserve source retention metadata when known and not exceed local configured retention silently.
risk: Kolm could retain imported rows longer than the source project.
recommended_action: Require explicit local retention regardless of source default.

current_or_source_truth: Langfuse trace deletion deletes related scores and observations across data stores and supports single, batch, query, project, org, and user account deletion.
kolm_policy: Kolm purge should delete imported row, score, raw sidecar, and generated label export together.
risk: Source deletion semantics may be stronger than local importer behavior.
recommended_action: Implement cascade purge for imported rows and score sidecars.

current_or_source_truth: LangSmith retention is configurable at workspace/project levels, with base and extended trace retention.
kolm_policy: Importer should store source retention tier when available and local retention independently.
risk: Retention source changes may apply only to new traces.
recommended_action: Do not infer source retention for old exports; require local retention.

current_or_source_truth: LangSmith trace deletes can be by trace IDs or metadata and are not instant; related feedback, aggregations, and stats are deleted.
kolm_policy: Kolm purge should produce verifiable local deletion status rather than assuming source deletion timing.
risk: Users may think deleting in source deletes imported rows.
recommended_action: Add source_deleted_at and local_purged_at fields.

current_or_source_truth: LangSmith docs distinguish soft and hard deletion for examples.
kolm_policy: Importer should not promise hard delete for distributed artifacts.
risk: Hard-delete expectations conflict with portable artifact distribution.
recommended_action: Keep source identifiers out of artifacts and document purge limits.

current_or_source_truth: Phoenix self-hosted keeps trace/eval/dataset data inside customer infrastructure and gives storage/access/retention control to the operator.
kolm_policy: Kolm should treat Phoenix imports as customer-controlled but still require local privacy mode.
risk: Self-hosted source privacy can be weakened by hosted Kolm import.
recommended_action: Prefer local/offline importer mode for Phoenix exports.

current_or_source_truth: Phoenix default retention is indefinite and retention policies can be time or count based.
kolm_policy: Kolm import should not copy indefinite retention by default.
risk: Indefinite local retention is unsafe for production traces.
recommended_action: Require explicit retention_days or explicit indefinite-local flag.

current_or_source_truth: Phoenix can disable telemetry and external resources in self-hosted/air-gapped deployments.
kolm_policy: Kolm importer should support offline fixture mode without external API calls.
risk: Air-gapped users cannot use importer if it phones home or fetches remote docs.
recommended_action: Make fixture importer fully offline.

current_or_source_truth: Braintrust logs are production traces/spans used for analysis and feedback loops.
kolm_policy: Kolm should treat Braintrust imports as production data unless source says synthetic.
risk: Production traces may contain customer or regulated data.
recommended_action: Default Braintrust importer to redacted or hash-only in docs.

current_or_source_truth: Braintrust supports deleting traces via UI or marking logs for deletion through API events.
kolm_policy: Kolm manifest should preserve source delete refs but never require source credentials for local purge.
risk: Imported Braintrust rows can survive source deletion.
recommended_action: Add purge by source_row_id and source_system.

current_or_source_truth: Score comments and human review notes can contain sensitive text.
kolm_policy: Treat comments as raw text subject to redaction or hash-only handling.
risk: Comments can leak sensitive user content into manifests or artifacts.
recommended_action: Never embed comments in artifacts; redact or hash in rows.

current_or_source_truth: Loss reports are needed but can leak sampled raw fields.
kolm_policy: Loss reports should record field paths and counts, not raw sample values, unless raw mode allows it.
risk: Debug reports can become shadow data stores.
recommended_action: Make no-samples the default loss-report mode.

current_or_source_truth: Write-back wants artifact ID, K-score, receipts, avoided-call proof, and fallback counts.
kolm_policy: Write back Kolm metadata without copying local raw payloads back to source.
risk: Write-back can reintroduce sensitive derived data into source systems.
recommended_action: Define write-back payload allowlist.

current_or_source_truth: No importer privacy fixtures exist.
kolm_policy: Add blocked, hash-only, redacted, raw, missing retention, identity hashing, sidecar purge, and artifact-boundary tests.
risk: Privacy promises will be unverifiable.
recommended_action: Make privacy fixtures launch-blocking for importers.

current_or_source_truth: Public claims should not say governed trace import until privacy gates, purge, and retention jobs exist.
kolm_policy: Use preview/internal labels until tests pass.
risk: Claims could outrun deletion and retention controls.
recommended_action: Gate importer copy on privacy test suite and purge command.
